nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 阿拉戈斯州
nodes.summary: 阿拉戈斯州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联25种鸟类，包括Russet-crowned crake、Pygmy nightjar、长尾妍蜂鸟等25种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 帕拉伊巴州
nodes.summary: 帕拉伊巴州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联15种鸟类，包括黄腿穴䳍、White-throated spadebill、Ochre-bellied flycatcher等15种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Gallery forest
nodes.summary: Gallery forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Blue-throated piping guan、White-throated piping guan、黑額鳴冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 次生林
nodes.summary: 次生林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联749种鸟类，包括孤䳍、Sickle-winged guan、黑額鳴冠雉等749种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: White-throated spadebill
nodes.summary: White-throated spadebill（White-throated spadebill，学名 Platyrinchus mystaceus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: niveigularis: separate from all other subspecies; coastal northeastern Brazil from Paraíba south to Alagoas The white-throated spadebill inhabits a variety of wooded landscapes, with some differences between the groups

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: niveigularis: separate from all other subspecies; coastal northeastern Brazil from Paraíba south to Alagoas The white-throated spadebill inhabits a variety of wooded landscapes, with some differences between the groups

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The "western" subspecies are found in humid foothill and montane forest, drier forest, gallery forest, and mature secondary woodlands; they also occur at brushy and bamboo-thicket forest edges and locally in lowlands

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The "western" subspecies are found in humid foothill and montane forest, drier forest, gallery forest, and mature secondary woodlands; they also occur at brushy and bamboo-thicket forest edges and locally in lowlands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: The "western" subspecies are found in humid foothill and montane forest, drier forest, gallery forest, and mature secondary woodlands; they also occur at brushy and bamboo-thicket forest edges and locally in lowlands

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats to either have been identified. The white-throated spadebill is considered common in Costa Rica and Peru, "at most fairly common" in Colombia, "widespread" in Ecuador, and "fairly common and widespread" in Venezuela. It occurs in many protected areas but has "suffered from deforestation in lowlands in some areas"
